diagrams.title: Classification of Data Structures
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical classification of data structures into primitive and non-primitive, with linear and non-linear subdivisions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the organization and relationships between different types of data structures

diagrams.title: Time Complexity Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how different time complexities grow with input size
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing and comparing growth rates of various time complexities to make informed design choices
